title: Things ending with Sam (5/7/24 — discovery night, Jaden bed-share)
html:
TL;DR

  • 11:31 PM 5/6/24 — Yahir gets the second wave of news that Jaden slept in the same bed as Sam Solum after they kissed and smoked, ~4 weeks prior.
  • Recap chain: tells Cameron first, then Ayden / Riley / Kyle (who came down out of FOMO).
  • Sam's defense — "in the moment she didn't know if I was into her or talking to other girls" — Yahir doesn't accept it. Sam knows she fucked up; Yahir notes she didn't bring up the prior ED struggle ("BlueChew came in, piped the fuck out of her") that he wonders if it played in.
  • Trust totally broken. Frames the relationship as already a "grind" (Sam's Paige no-talk rule, moving out, his 6-month China departure) — "I was going to try goddammit, but the universe had other plans."
  • Names the fundamental misalignments: handling-of-challenges, optimism asymmetry, "the dynamic of only taking and rarely giving." The power-differential ick: "a bitch I can do what I want with is attractive, but it also means you decide outcomes for them."
  • Closes clean: "I regret nothing… besides regretting the Paige thing."

Notes

This is the sibling document to the same-day "morning after Sam" recovery doc — they bookend the breakup. This one is the decision moment: Yahir captures the discovery, the recap-chain, the litmus-test reframing of what he actually wants ("someone who holds my hand and jumps in with me"), and signs off after the final 8:15-9:20 PM phone call.

The last embrace of Sam in writing. Yahir converts the breakup-discovery into product-spec for the next-relationship — same max effort commit framing that becomes operational by the Emily arc. The litmus-test list here is one of the most explicit partner-criteria docs in the corpus: "What did I do to deserve this person, thank fucking god for making me this lucky" + reciprocated, both partners aware of why they can't share when they can't, max-effort-commit that doesn't feel like effort because it's the natural default.

The Jaden bed-share is the precipitating event that the April 30 yearn doc hadn't yet surfaced. The discovery sequence (Cameron first → Ayden/Riley → Kyle FOMO) is a useful diagnostic of Yahir's friend recap chain — who he tells in what order when something breaks.

Privacy redactions (inline): Two explicit sexual references about Sam preserved as-is (they're load-bearing for the misalignment-reframing). Jaden's identity stays at first-name only — flagged as ambiguous in log's Potential Entities. ED-medication name preserved (consumer brand, not protected health info).
